venue.name: Aquilino Q. Pimentel Jr. International Convention Center (Venue)

listings.name: APICC On-Site Parking (surface lot)
listings.address: Aquilino Q. Pimentel Jr. Int'l Convention Center grounds
listings.desc: Existing surface parking area adjacent to the main building.

listings.name: Ultra Winds Mountain Resort (nearest lodging to venue)
listings.address: Convention Center Access Rd, Brgy. Pualas, Baungon, Bukidnon 8707
listings.desc: Mountain resort directly along the venue access road. Reviewers note it's pricey and taxis charge roughly double (~₱500) for the ride. (Closest option to venue from the venue.)

listings.name: Seda Centrio Hotel
listings.address: C.M. Recto Ave corner Corrales Ave, Cagayan de Oro
listings.desc: Mid-range business hotel in the downtown core. (~10-15 km / 30-45 min drive from the venue.)

listings.name: Hamersons Hotel CDO
listings.address: Near Museo de Oro, Cagayan de Oro
listings.desc: Hotel with restaurant, bar, and free private parking. (~10-15 km / 30-45 min drive from the venue.)

listings.name: Demiren Hotel
listings.address: Near Centrio Mall, Cagayan de Oro
listings.desc: Hotel with restaurant and free amenities, short walk to Centrio Mall. (~10-15 km / 30-45 min drive from the venue.)

listings.name: J.R. Borja General Hospital
listings.desc: City-run public general hospital. (~10-15 km from venue from the venue.)

listings.name: Cagayan de Oro Medical Center
listings.desc: Private Level II hospital, 112-bed capacity. (~10-15 km from venue from the venue.)

listings.name: Indahag Urban Health Center
listings.address: Barangay Indahag, Cagayan de Oro City
listings.hours: Business hours, Mon-Fri (typical for barangay health centers)
listings.desc: Local government barangay health center serving Indahag, the venue's own barangay. (Closest barangay clinic to venue from the venue.)

listings.name: Cugman Urban Health Center
listings.address: Barangay Cugman, Cagayan de Oro City
listings.desc: Barangay health center in Cugman, on the way toward Indahag/venue. (Along the route from downtown to venue from the venue.)

listings.name: Laguindingan Airport
listings.desc: Nearest airport serving Cagayan de Oro; primary arrival point for delegates flying in. (~45 km / 1 to 1.5 hr drive from venue from the venue.)

listings.name: Agora Bus & Jeepney Terminal
listings.desc: Main city terminal. Note: no direct jeepney or bus route currently serves the venue itself — plan for taxi or ride-hailing for the final leg. (~10-15 km from venue from the venue.)

listings.name: Taxi / Ride-hailing pickup, downtown CDO
listings.address: Various points, downtown Cagayan de Oro
listings.desc: Public transport does not reach the elevated venue directly; taxis and ride-hailing apps are the practical option for the final approach. (Starting point for ~30-45 min ride to venue from the venue.)

listings.name: Saint Francis Doctors' Hospital and Medical Center Uptown
listings.address: Upper Canitoan, Masterson Ave, Upper Canitoan, Cagayan De Oro City, 9000 Misamis Oriental
listings.desc: Private Hospital (5.9 km from venue (10 min. drive via S diversion rd.) from the venue.)

listings.name: SM Uptown
listings.address: Uptown, Pueblo de Oro Township, Fr. Masterson Avenue, Cor Gran Via, Carmen, Cagayan De Oro City, 9000 Misamis Oriental
listings.desc: SM City Cagayan de Oro Uptown is the first SM Supermall in Northern Mindanao, located in Pueblo de Oro Township, Uptown Carmen. It operates daily from 10:00 AM to 9:00 PM and features a wide range of retail, dining, entertainment, and service establishments across its 87,000+ sqm floor area.

listings.name: Our Story Boutique Hotel
listings.address: Taguanao Road Upper, Indahag, Cagayan De Oro City, 9000 Misamis Oriental
listings.desc: Our Story Boutique Hotel in Cagayan de Oro offers a cozy, boutique-style stay with modern amenities, scenic views, and convenient access to the city. Guests enjoy free Wi-Fi, complimentary breakfast, and a mix of deluxe and superior rooms, some with balconies overlooking the surrounding landscape.

listings.name: Gaisano City Uptown
listings.address: CJJ8+FQX, Cagayan De Oro City, Misamis Oriental
listings.desc: Gaisano City Uptown is a popular shopping mall in Cagayan de Oro, Northern Mindanao, known for its convenience, accessibility, and variety of retail and dining options.
